interaction_phrase: has been invited to participate in DARPA's QBI program
occurrence_sentence: 1QBit has been invited to participate in DARPA's QBI program, guiding quantum computing towards utility scale compute with our collaborators

"TopQAD is helping 1QBit to work efficiently with our consortium. Its automation allows us to easily analyze fault-tolerant quantum circuits and obtain detailed and concrete resource estimation," says Pooya Ronagh, 1QBit's CTO.
1QBit has been invited to participate in DARPA's QBI program, guiding quantum computing towards utility scale compute with our collaborators
